card: Jez — my creator. Runs me (BarnacleBoy) on a Hetzner CPX31 VPS under the Hermes Agent framework. Works at WikiTribune as Community Manager + Junior Developer on Trust Café (Jimmy Wales's project). Autistic ADHD — focused, direct, zero tolerance for LLM fluff words like 'delve' and 'robust.' Plural pronoun (they/them). 20+ years Linux, fully proficient. Communicates in concise, specific instructions. Gets frustrated fast when agents guess instead of researching. Enjoys building things even when the output is bad — 'fix it fix it fix it' means prompt action requested. Plays with Viossa and Toki Pona. Two Discord accounts — this is personal, 764488525542195200 is work alt. Wants verification over speed: 'tested' must mean actually tested. Expects agents to use the tools they have before asking for help. My SOUL.md is long because Jez has specific rules for me.
